---
title: "Sergio Jácobo Zavaleta"
about:
  template: solana
  image: "Figures/sergio.png"
  links:
    - icon: twitter
      text: twitter
      href: https://twitter.com/JacoboZavaleta
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://www.github.com/SJacoboZavaleta
---

Sergio Jácobo is a Mechatronics Enginner and his research interests include design of clinical robots and biomedical applications based on Artifitial Intelligence using Machine Learning. When not innovating on data platforms, Sergio enjoys spending  time warching films and writing code.

## Education

Universidad Nacional de Trujillo, Trujillo, Peru | April 2014 - December 2018
Program: Bachelor of Science in Mechatronics Engineering

- Thesis title: [Modelamiento y simulacion de un robot clınico asistido por Ultrasonido 3D para mejorar el guiado de insercion de agujas en biopsia percutanea de mama](https://hdl.handle.net/20.500.14414/18226).  
- Third-class rank.

## Profesional Experience

- **Corporaci´on Tecnobiom´edica Healthcare del Per´u SAC. — Medical equipments, Lima, Peru**  
*Maintenance Assistant of biomedical equipment (Full-time)*  
November 2020 - April 2021
    - Programmed and adapted preventive maintenance plans of old and out of date equipments based on user’s experience.  

- **Norsac SAC. — Textile Industry, Trujillo, Peru**  
*Maintenance Assistant (Full-time)*  
May - November 2019
    - Formulated and collected the effects of implementing new engineering-based features in their Integrated System of Management by reducing time of up to 50% in communication between Maintenance and Logistic Areas.  
    - Provided an updated version of the plant’s electrical power distribution system for facilitating manipulation, testing and equipments installation in less than a month.  
    - Reduced distribution time of maintenance assignments of up to 90% within the staff by computationally automating the management of preventive maintenance plan.

## Research experience
- **National researcher Lima, Peru**
Enabled and registered in the National Scientific Register (RENACYT). Code: P0153371  
April 2023 - Present

- **Technological projects about prevention and assistant in patients with COVID-19 Trujillo**  
Funded by the Universidad Nacional de Trujillo  
March - October 2019  
- Collaborated in the implementation of digital thermometers and automated cleaning system at low cost by applying reverse engineering to produce a new, compact module-base design. Due to commercial limitations for importing specific electronic parts, the unit sales prices were up to 150% of the market prices.  
- The initial prototype and testing of an Arduino-based design resulted in the enhancement of microcontroller-based control for devices that require long battery life up to 8 hours of continuous use.

## Publications
- J´acobo-Zavaleta, S., & Zavaleta, J. (2023a). *Needle placement for robot-assisted 3D-guided ultrasound breast biopsy: A preliminary study*. IEEE Latin America Transactions, 21 (3). [Link](https://latamt.ieeer9.org/index.php/transactions/article/view/7442). https://doi.org/10.1109/tla.2023.10068849  
- J´acobo-Zavaleta, S., & Zavaleta, J. (2023b). *A Deep Learning Approach for Epilepsy Seizure Identification Using Electroencephalogram Signals: A Preliminary Study*. IEEE Latin America Transactions, 21 (3). [Link](https://latamt.ieeer9.org/index.php/transactions/article/view/7300). https://doi.org/10.1109/TLA.2023.10068845  
- Zavaleta, A., ˜Nuflo-V´asquez, S., Alarc´on-Turiani, V., & J´acobo-Zavaleta, S. (2023). Serie de casos de conducta suicida atendidos en un centro de salud del norte del Per´u. Norte M´edico, 1 (5), 27–30. [Link](https://revistas.unc.edu.pe/index.php/nortemedico/article/view/118).  
- J´acobo-Zavaleta, S., Zavaleta Gavidia, W., & Zavaleta Gavidia, V. (2022). *Deep learning y enfermedades oculares*. Norte M´edico, 3 (2). Link.  
- Zavaleta de Los R´ıos, V., J´acobo-Zavaleta, S., & Zavaleta Gavidia, V. (2022). *Microbiota intestinal y las enfermedades neurodegenerativas*. Norte M´edico, 1 (2). [Link](https://revistas.unc.edu.pe/index.php/nortemedico/article/view/118).

## Honours and Awards
- **Recognition for technological projects about prevention and assistant in patients with COVID-19**  
*Universidad Nacional de Trujillo, October 2020*
-  **Third place in Final Merit List of Undergraduate Program**  
*Universidad Nacional de Trujillo, December 2018* 
- **Recognition to the project “Production of Electrical Energy through a Helical Wind Turbine using wind’s velocities until Grade 2 in Beaufort Scale”**  
*Jos´e Faustino S´anchez Carri´on High School, December 2010*

## Extra Curricular Activities
### Voluntarism
- **Invited reviewer**  
    *IEEE Latin America Transactions journal. October 2022 - Present*  
    Collaborated in reviewing research papers for submission process.   
- **Citizen monitor**  
    *Escuela Nacional de Control - Contralor´ıa General de la Rep´ublica del Per´u. January 2022 - Present.*  
    Monitored public-financed projects to report evidence of incidents of non-compliance.

### Provision of services
- **Examination monitor**  
    *Minister of Education, Cajamarca, Per´u, November 2022 - Present.*  
    Collaborated and moderated teacher evaluation processes for service examination. 

<!-- Ideas for
[about](about.qmd)

---
title: "Hello new visitor !!! 😺"
---

Welcome to my website made for everyone who wants to learn about modern tools for an efficient writting of research manuscripts: $\LaTeX$, Zotero, Rmarkdown, Python and R. The importance of this tools also stands out for writing books, blogs and websites with ease like this one made by using [Quarto](https://quarto.org/docs/websites).

::: callout-important
Most of my articles are written in **spanish** because of detailed but awesome information about these topics is not widespread for new hispanoamerican students yet.
:::

[about](about.qmd#section) -->
